name: maya-web
description: Mayan Tzolkin kin calculator — PureScript port of the Haskell library, compiled to a static web app.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n bundle,css,serve -c cyan,magenta,green "chokidar 'src/**/*.purs' -c 'spago bundle' --initial" "tailwindcss -i src/input.css -o public/tailwind.css --watch" "live-server public --port=3000 --no-browser"
